title: Connected Chains 3D
description: A Resource Pack that remodels chains to be 3D and makes chains longer to allow them to connect to other blocks
body:
# Connected Chains 3D

The 3D version of [Connected Chains](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/connected-chains)
With the Connected Chains Resource Pack your chains will better connect to non-full blocks and allow you to create more interesting and realistic builds using chains.

The pack is very lightweight only modifying the chain model itself allowing it to work well with other resource packs and mods.
Note that this pack also alters the model of lanterns and soul lanterns for them to align with the 3d appearance of the chains.

## Using the pack your chains will connect to things such as:
- Walls and fences
- Chains facing other directions
- Flower pots
- Mob heads
- And more

Below are some pictures showcasing what you can do with this Resource Pack
![An animated gif showcasing the difference between vanilla and the custom chains](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e951f42b445e3fb03bb286fe70ba1c1a8fe3a530.gif)
![A scene showcasing some different uses for the custom chains](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7045a8c2e2c87a6c93522cdec033108095699338_0.webp)
